[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11001001 4
1 11111110 7
2 10100011 4
3 11011111 7
4 11001001 4
5 11011110 6
6 10010111 5
7 11110111 7

01 10 10111110 6
12 21 11101101 6
23 32 11001101 5
34 43 10011111 6
45 54 10011110 5
56 65 11110110 6
67 76 11110111 7 match 7
70 07 11111111 a

02 20 11111111 a
13 31 10101001 4
24 42 11011111 7 match 3
35 53 10011111 6
46 64 11111110 7 match 1
57 75 11110111 7 match 7
60 06 11111110 7 match 1
71 17 11110101 6

25 52 11011111 7 match 3
36 63 11111111 a
47 74 11111111 a
50 05 10111110 6
61 16 11110110 6
72 27 11111101 7

37 73 11111101 7
